title: The Color Purple By Alice Walker | Explanation In Hindi
description:
The Color Purple, novel by Alice Walker, published in 1982. It won a Pulitzer Prize in 1983. A feminist work about an abused and uneducated African American woman Celie's struggle for empowerment
